subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who sendeth down verses with wondrous originality, in such melody as doth attract unto Him all them that are nigh, and hath ordained therein their measures [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی ینزل الایات بدعا علی لحن تجذب عنه المقربین جمیعا و قدر فیها مقادیر
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation
